text: Hey, I ordered that fancy coffee maker last month but it's still not here! I was really counting on it for my morning routine. Can I get my money back? Oh, and I saw some review online about how yours doesn't brew correctly sometimes, which is a bit concerning. Anyway, just let me know what I should do, thanks!
I'm having a weird issue where my app crashes every time I try to open it, but only when I'm on Wi-Fi. It's so strange! Any idea what could be wrong?

I'm having a bit of a problem accessing my account because it keeps saying my details are incorrect, but I know I've entered everything correctly. Could you please help me figure out why I can't get in? It would be great if you could also let me know what I should do next to resolve this issue and if there are any additional steps I might need to take in case this happens again in the future.
I don’t know why my order hasn’t arrived yet, plus the tracking link just keeps spinning. What’s up with that? I thought I’d get it by now, and it's my birthday next week!
Hey, I accidentally ordered two of the same item and I just want to get one refunded. Can you help me with that?
I am experiencing frequent connectivity issues with the application. It fails to load properly and often logs me out unexpectedly. Can you please provide assistance in resolving this matter?
I submitted a refund request last week, but now I see that my order was canceled. Can I still get my money back? It’s confusing because I thought I wouldn’t have to ask again.
Hey, my app keeps crashing every time I try to load my profile. Also, I wanted to know if there are any upcoming events because I missed the last one. Can you help?

Hello, I hope this message finds you well. I’m reaching out because I recently made a purchase, but I seem to have been charged twice for it, which is a bit puzzling. I didn’t expect this to happen, and while I appreciate the promptness of the service, I’d like to request a refund for the additional charge. Could you please assist me with this? I’d hate to think that my account might be compromised, but it does concern me slightly. Thank you for your help!
I can't access my account, but I'm not sure why.
My app keeps crashing. I don't know why. Just started today. Help?
My app says I'm offline, but I have Wi-Fi. Can you fix it or is it my internet?
I can't access my account anymore. It just says error. Please help.

I can't believe this is happening! I was promised a refund for that terrible experience, but it's been weeks and nothing. The whole situation is just so unfair and I’m really starting to lose hope here! Can someone please help me?
I'm really confused about my recent order. It says delivered, but I never received anything! Could you please help me figure out what might have happened? I'm kind of stressing out over this.
My app keeps crashing. Like, every time I try to open it. Not sure what's going on!
